title: Watt a load of crap: UK start-up is turning number twos into number one with shockingly superior sewage battery tech
summary: Power failures at pumping stations are widely recognised as one trigger for these spills, alongside heavy rainfall and ageing infrastructure Rheya Labs is now working on a system that pairs instant battery backup with software designed to flag faults before they cause…
